channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Coltide Luhwago’s Journey to Leadership in Claims and Compliance
item.description: Coltide Luhwago, Claims Manager at Tanzania East Africa Gateway Terminal Limited (TEAGTL), is known for her dedication, integrity, and fairness in the field of insurance and risk management. Starting ...

item.title: How Russian Mercenaries Are Making West Africa More Insecure
item.description: For West Africa, di security palava no dey easy again. From Mali, Burkina Faso, Niger reach Nigeria, di region dey face wahala wey no be small because of jihadi groups like Boko Haram, ISWAP, and JNIM...

item.title: DPWH holds university job fairs to recruit new professionals amid corruption cleanup
item.description: The Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) has begun conducting job fairs in several universities across the Philippines to recruit fresh graduates and soon-to-be graduates as part of its effo...

item.title: 36 Rajasthan Police Recruits Dismissed Over Fake AI Videos in Gwalior
item.description: In Gwalior, a serious issue has emerged involving fake AI-generated videos that created a major uproar among local authorities and the public. The controversy led to disciplinary action by the Rajasth...

item.title: Two Explosive Drones Intercepted in Islamabad, Possibly from Afghanistan
item.description: Islamabad witnessed a tense situation on Friday when two drones were intercepted in the capital, according to sources. One of the drones reportedly fell near Faizabad while the second landed in Islama...

item.title: Kogi State Pays March Salaries Early Ahead of Eid-el-Fitr
item.description: Kogi State Government don approve say dem go pay civil servants their March salaries earlier than normal so dat dem fit prepare well for the upcoming Eid-el-Fitr celebration. Governor Ahmed Usman Odod...

item.title: Essex Town Hall Expansion Making Steady Progress
item.description: Construction work on the Essex Town Hall expansion is moving along smoothly, according to local officials and project managers. The expansion aims to enhance municipal services and provide additional ...

item.title: US-Iran conflict intensifies with aircraft crash and Tehran explosion
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US and Iran has escalated, with several significant developments reported. A US military KC-135 refuelling aircraft crashed in western Iraq, resulting in the deaths of...

item.title: SANDF conducts raids on West Rand homes linked to illegal mining
item.description: On Friday, members of the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) carried out coordinated raids on multiple houses in Rietvallei, West Rand, suspected of being involved in illegal mining operatio...

item.title: Islamabad Airport Flight Schedule Briefly Adjusted, Operations Now Normal
item.description: On Friday, the Pakistan Airports Authority (PAA) informed that Islamabad International Airport experienced a brief adjustment in its flight schedule due to operational reasons. According to PAA spokes...

item.title: Severe Floods in Kenya Leave 62 Dead and Thousands Displaced
item.description: Kenya is currently dealing with heavy floods following persistent heavy rains, with the Ministry of Interior and National Administration reporting at least 62 deaths nationwide. Nairobi has been hit t...

item.title: Kozhikode Beach fire station to resume services through temporary unit
item.description: Responding to repeated appeals from city residents and traders, the Fire and Rescue Services in Kozhikode are preparing to open a temporary unit of the Kozhikode Beach fire station, which was closed t...

item.title: South African Schools Introduce Bilingual Education Without Removing English
item.description: Claims have been circulating on social media that the South African government is removing English from public schools. This is not accurate. The government is expanding mother-tongue based bilingual ...

item.title: Major Philippine and Global Headlines for March 13, 2026
item.description: Rappler’s March 13, 2026 daily news wrap features key political, economic, and international updates. A recent Pulse Asia survey reveals that 64% of Filipinos support the approval of an anti-political...

item.title: Government reviews Ngorongoro relocation programme to address legal and cultural challenges
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has confirmed that the government will carefully examine and implement recommendations from two special commissions she appointed to assess issues in the voluntary reloca...

item.title: Motional launches robotaxi service on Uber app in Las Vegas following company restructuring
item.description: Hyundai-owned Motional has officially launched its autonomous vehicle service on Uber’s app in Las Vegas, two years after the company faced financial and operational challenges. The self-driving versi...

item.title: S&P 500 falls as tensions escalate in Middle East, crude prices climb
item.description: The S&P 500 initially opened nearly 1 per cent higher but later reversed course, extending losses as reports emerged of escalating military actions by both the US and Israel against Iran. Brent Crude ...

item.title: Poilievre begins U.S. trip to discuss Canada-U.S. trade and automotive industry
item.description: Canada's Official Opposition leader, Conservative Pierre Poilievre, is embarking on a U.S. trip with a focus on the automotive industry and cross-border trade. He will begin in Windsor, Ontario, Canad...

item.title: Michigan synagogue attack suspect had family killed in recent Lebanon airstrike
item.description: Ayman Mohamad Ghazali, a 41-year-old naturalised US citizen originally from Lebanon, attempted to drive a vehicle into Temple Israel in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan, on Thursday afternoon. Secur...

item.title: Senator Karen Nyamu Highlights Modesty and Legislative Achievements During Embakasi Rally
item.description: During a lively campaign rally in Embakasi East, Nairobi, Senator Karen Nyamu made headlines not just for her political agenda but also for her choice of a modest outfit. The mother of four, who is ca...
